meta.title: Oceanarium Rosario Islands | Bolívar, Colombia
meta.description: Explore Oceanarium Rosario Islands, a marine research center in Cartagena, Colombia, featuring rich Caribbean marine life exhibits and ecological conservation programs.

hero.title: Oceanarium Rosario Islands
hero.subtitle: Colombia's Marine Gem, Caribbean Ecological Wonder

intro.title: Explore Oceanarium Rosario Islands
intro.description:
Oceanarium Rosario Islands (Oceanario Islas del Rosario) is located in the Rosario Islands near Cartagena, Bolívar, Colombia. It is a world-class aquarium dedicated to marine biology research, conservation, and education.

As an important part of the Rosario and San Bernardo Corals National Natural Park, it showcases the rich Caribbean marine ecosystem, including coral reefs, tropical fish, sea turtles, and various marine species. The aquarium is not only a tourist attraction but also an important marine research and ecological conservation center.

visitGuide.title: Preparation & Tips
items: 🚢 Transportation: Take a speedboat from Cartagena pier, about 45-60 minutes to the Rosario Islands. It is recommended to book boat tickets in advance or join a day tour.
🧴 Sun Protection: The Caribbean region has strong sunlight. Please bring sunscreen, hat, and sunglasses to protect your skin from UV damage.
💧 Stay Hydrated: Tropical climate is hot and humid. Please bring enough drinking water to avoid heatstroke and dehydration.

alsoKnownAs.title: Marine Ecology & Conservation
items: 🐠 Coral Reef Ecosystem: The aquarium showcases healthy coral reef ecosystems around the Rosario Islands, one of the most important marine protected areas in Colombia's Caribbean region.
🐢 Sea Turtle Conservation: The aquarium participates in sea turtle protection and rehabilitation programs. Visitors can learn about the habits and conservation status of these marine reptiles.
🐬 Marine Mammals: Exhibits include marine mammals including dolphins, promoting marine ecological conservation knowledge.
♻️ Sustainable Tourism: Please follow the aquarium's rules, do not touch marine life, and help protect the fragile marine ecosystem.

basicInfo.title: Quick Facts
basicInfo.officialNameValue: Oceanarium Rosario Islands (Oceanario Islas del Rosario)
basicInfo.addressValue: Islas del Rosario, Cartagena de Indias, Bolívar, Colombia
basicInfo.petFriendlyValue: Pets not allowed (to protect marine life)
basicInfo.ticketsValue: Ticket prices vary by package. It is recommended to check and book online in advance

hours.title: Opening Hours & Visitor Info
hours.summerTime: Sunny weather, stable sea conditions, ideal for boating and marine life viewing
hours.winterTime: Coral reef exhibits, sea turtle sanctuary, tropical fish gallery, marine ecology education
hours.warningTime: Afternoon showers are possible in the Caribbean region. It is recommended to depart in the morning. Wear life jackets when boating and pay attention to safety.
hours.tip: It is recommended to reserve at least 3-4 hours to visit the aquarium, and prepare extra time to enjoy the nearby beaches and snorkeling activities.

tickets.title: Important Information
tickets.outdoorPrice: Prices vary by package. Check official website or online booking platforms
tickets.adultsPrice: Speedboat from Cartagena pier, about 45-60 minutes
tickets.studentsPrice: Reserve 3-4 hours for visit, can combine with day tour package
tickets.cardPrice: Snorkeling, beach relaxation, island exploration. 👉 [Go to Rosario Islands]
tickets.officialNotice: It is recommended to book tickets online in advance, especially during peak tourist season. For more details, visit

transport.title: Transportation
transport.airportDesc: From Rafael Núñez International Airport (Cartagena), you need to first reach Cartagena city center, then go to the pier to take a speedboat to the Rosario Islands.
transport.selfDriveDesc: Drive to Cartagena pier, then park and take a speedboat. Please note pier parking fees and safety.
transport.busDesc: From Cartagena city center, you can take a taxi or bus to the pier, then take a speedboat to the Rosario Islands.
transport.intercityDesc: Take a speedboat from Cartagena pier, about 45-60 minutes. It is recommended to book boat tickets in advance.
transport.cyclingDesc: Consider joining a day tour package including transportation, tickets, and lunch for more convenience.
transport.tipsDesc: Depart in the morning to avoid afternoon showers. Bring sun protection, swimwear, and towels for beach and snorkeling activities.

items.name: Carlos Mendoza
items.text: Excellent aquarium! Showcases the rich marine ecosystem of the Rosario Islands, perfect for families and children.

items.name: Li Xiaoming
items.text: Very convenient to come by boat from Cartagena. The aquarium is beautifully designed with diverse marine life. Highly recommended!

items.name: María González
items.text: A must-visit place in Colombia! Learn about Caribbean coral reef ecosystems and marine conservation.

items.name: John Smith
items.text: Unforgettable experience! The sea turtle sanctuary is特别棒, and the staff are very professional and friendly.

items.name: Ana Silva
items.text: Beautiful marine life exhibits, but it gets quite crowded on weekends. Recommend visiting on weekdays for a better experience.

items.name: Zhang Wei
items.text: Absolutely worth a visit! Remember to bring your camera, every angle is a beautiful marine landscape.

items.name: Roberto Pérez
items.text: This is a model of marine ecological conservation in Colombia! The design and exhibits of the aquarium are very professional.

items.name: Emma Wilson
items.text: I joined a full-day tour package including aquarium visit, snorkeling, and lunch. Totally worth it!

officialManagement.title: About Oceanarium Rosario Islands
officialManagement.text: Oceanarium Rosario Islands is a famous marine biology research institution in Cartagena, Bolívar, Colombia, known for its Caribbean marine ecosystem exhibits and marine conservation research, supported by Colombia's National Natural Parks administration and relevant local governments.

historyTimeline.title: Historical Timeline

items.title: Early Period: Marine Conservation & Research
items.description: Oceanarium Rosario Islands, as an important part of the Rosario and San Bernardo Corals National Natural Park, has long been an important marine ecology research and conservation center in Colombia's Caribbean region.

items.title: 20th Century: Eco-Tourism Development
items.description: With the growth of tourism in Colombia, Oceanarium Rosario Islands gradually became one of the most popular marine eco-tourism destinations, attracting visitors from around the world.

items.title: 21st Century: Sustainable Development Recognition
items.description: As an important institution for marine conservation in Colombia's Caribbean region, the aquarium has gained international recognition and support, dedicated to marine ecological conservation and sustainable development education.

historyTimeline.guideContent: When visiting, you can take a speedboat from Cartagena to the Rosario Islands; then visit the aquarium's coral reef exhibits and marine life exhibition areas; if you have enough time, you can join snorkeling activities or explore the nearby beaches. Finally, return to Cartagena to explore this historic city.

route.title: Tour Guide
route.overview: There are mainly the following ways to explore Oceanarium Rosario Islands. Please choose according to your time and interests:
steps: Highlights: After taking a speedboat from Cartagena to the Rosario Islands, first visit the aquarium's main exhibition areas, including coral reef ecosystem, tropical fish gallery, sea turtle sanctuary, etc. You can enjoy lunch at the island's restaurant at noon.
In the afternoon, you can join snorkeling activities to explore the nearby coral reef ecosystem, or simply relax on the beach.
2. Day Tour Package (Suitable for tourists with limited time): About 6-8 hours

Highlights: If you have limited time or want a more convenient experience, you can choose a day tour package. The package usually includes round-trip transportation from Cartagena pier, aquarium tickets, lunch, and snorkeling gear rental.
supplements: Ticket prices vary by package. It is recommended to check and book online in advance, especially during peak tourist season.
Touching marine life is prohibited in the aquarium. Please follow the rules and protect the fragile marine ecosystem.
The Rosario Islands are located in the Caribbean Sea with strong sunlight. Please prepare for sun protection and bring enough water.
